welcome.title: Welcome to KIAAN
welcome.subtitle: Your calm, modern spiritual companion — always here, always supportive.
welcome.description: Calm, privacy-first spiritual companion with journaling, guided chats, and dashboards.

chat.title: Talk to KIAAN
chat.subtitle: Gentle guidance with an ember glow
chat.connectionDesc: Your questions animate into focus—answers remain unchanged.

emptyState.title: How can I guide you today?
emptyState.subtitle: Share what's on your mind

chat.disclaimer: KIAAN भवतः आध्यात्मिकसहचरः, भगवद्गीतातः प्राचीनज्ञानात् च चिन्तनानि विभजति।
chat.shareWarning: You are about to share spiritual wellness information. Please ensure you're comfortable sharing this content publicly.
chat.defaultResponse: अहम् अत्र अस्मि। किम् भवति तत् वदतु, वयं सहैव समाधानं कुर्मः।
chat.featureLocked: This feature requires a higher plan. [View plans](/pricing) to unlock it.
chat.quotaExceeded: Your monthly quota has been reached. [Upgrade your plan](/pricing) to continue chatting.

guidanceModes.title: Guidance modes
guidanceModes.subtitle: Triangle of Flowing Energy
guidanceModes.selectPrompt: Tap a mode to explore how KIAAN guides your state.

innerPeace.title: Inner Peace
innerPeace.description: Find stillness through breath-focused exercises and gentle grounding techniques. Perfect for moments when you need to calm your mind and reconnect with tranquility.

mindControl.title: Mind Control
mindControl.description: Develop focused clarity through structured mindfulness practices. Ideal for decision-making, concentration, and maintaining inner discipline.
mindControl.note: Steady steps, one thought at a time

selfKindness.title: Self Kindness
selfKindness.description: Cultivate compassion for yourself through warm, supportive exercises. Essential for healing, self-acceptance, and nurturing your emotional well-being.

clarityPause.title: Clarity Pause
clarityPause.subtitle: Create space before you act.
clarityPause.description: No advice. Just space to decide from clarity.
clarityPause.note: KIAAN stays untouched—decline to pass through instantly.
clarityPause.question: Are you acting from clarity or from emotion right now?

responses.peaceful: I'm glad you're feeling calm — stay with that softness for a moment. 💙
responses.happy: It's beautiful to see you feeling bright. Let that warmth stay with you. ✨
responses.neutral: Steady is good. You're showing up, and that matters. 🌿
responses.charged: That energy is powerful — channel it wisely. ⚡
responses.open: Being open takes courage. I'm here to support you. 🌤️
responses.grateful: Gratitude is a gift to yourself. Hold onto this feeling. 🙏
responses.reflective: Reflection brings clarity. Take your time with what you're feeling. 🪞
responses.determined: That fire in you is strong. Move forward with purpose. 🔥
responses.tender: Tenderness is strength. Be gentle with yourself right now. 💙
responses.tired: Rest is not weakness. Your body is telling you something important. 😴
responses.anxious: That anxious feeling is tough — take a breath, I'm with you. 🌊
responses.heavy: I'm sorry you're feeling low… you're not alone. I'm right here with you. 🌧️
responses.angry: It's okay — anger means something important needs attention. I'm here beside you. 🔥
responses.worried: Worry can feel overwhelming. Let's take this one step at a time together. 💭
responses.sad: Sadness is heavy, but you're not alone right now. I'm here with you. 💙
responses.lonely: Loneliness is tough, but you're not alone right now. I'm here with you. 🤝
responses.depressed: This weight is real, and it's hard. Please reach out — you don't have to carry this alone. 💙

quickPrompts.title: Quick Responses
quickPrompts.subtitle: Polished prompts that auto-fill KIAAN for you

anxiety.label: चिन्ता अधिका
anxiety.prompt: Guide me through a grounding exercise to steady anxious thoughts.

heavy.label: मनः भारम्
heavy.prompt: I need gentle words to lift my mood and remind me of my strengths.

anger.label: क्रोधप्रबन्धनम्
anger.prompt: Help me cool down my anger and respond with more patience.

clarity.label: स्पष्टता आवश्यका
clarity.prompt: Can you help me see the pros and cons before I decide on something important?

work.label: Work balance
work.prompt: Work feels overwhelming—walk me through a quick reset to regain focus.

relationships.label: सम्बन्धतनावः
relationships.prompt: How can I handle a tough conversation with care and honesty?

purpose.label: स्तब्धः अस्मि
purpose.prompt: I want a short reflection to reconnect with my purpose and direction.

peace.label: शान्तिः आवश्यका
peace.prompt: Lead me in a brief mindful moment so I can feel peaceful again.
